overview: A professional single-page business website for A2H Mobile Service Centre, a mobile phone repair shop in Melvisharam, Tamil Nadu. Features a dark/black theme with orange and white accents, complete services showcase, supported brands, gallery, and contact information.
features: Dark theme with orange and white accents
Hero section with banner image and Call Now button
Services showcase with 8 repair services including PCB/IC level
Supported brands section (iPhone, OPPO, Samsung, Mi, Vivo, Realme)
Contact section with address and phone
